reason_for_classification: This is an educational presentation (SAGES Educators Luncheon) about simulator technology and curriculum development. It contains PowerPoint slides with text content, institutional photos of simulation training, and teaching examples. There is no actual FLS task performance video present.
content_summary: Presentation by Denise W. Gee, MD on developing realistic and challenging simulation curricula. Covers simulator modalities (bench-top trainers, live animal models, cadavers, virtual reality), technical skills acquisition principles, MGH's simulation curriculum structure, needs assessment results, and examples of various surgical simulations including neurosurgery and orthopaedics.
